metadata.purpose: SEO metadata and schema markup for 5 super-tag clusters

seo.title: Hip-Hop & Music News | Deep Analysis | YOLO LAB
seo.description: Hip-hop and music industry coverage with artist profiles, new releases, events, and cultural analysis. Deep dives into music's intersection with society.

open_graph.title: Music & Hip-Hop Stories | YOLO LAB
open_graph.description: Explore hip-hop culture, artist analysis, music industry trends, and how music shapes society. Deep journalism on music's impact.

schema.name: Music & Hip-Hop News
schema.description: Hip-hop and music industry coverage with artist profiles, new releases, events, and cultural analysis. Deep dives into music's intersection with society.

seo.title: Film | TV | Anime | Gaming News & Analysis | YOLO LAB
seo.description: Entertainment industry coverage spanning film, television, anime, and gaming. Critical analysis of storytelling, industry trends, and cultural impact.

open_graph.title: Entertainment Stories | YOLO LAB
open_graph.description: Film, TV, anime, and gaming analysis. Explore storytelling, industry trends, and how entertainment shapes culture.

schema.name: Entertainment News & Analysis
schema.description: Entertainment industry coverage spanning film, television, anime, and gaming. Critical analysis of storytelling, industry trends, and cultural impact.

seo.title: Culture | People | Lifestyle | Events | YOLO LAB
seo.description: Cultural figures, events, classics, and lifestyle trends. Profiles of influential personalities across business, arts, and society.

open_graph.title: Culture & Lifestyle Stories | YOLO LAB
open_graph.description: Explore cultural figures, business leaders, lifestyle trends, and cultural events shaping society.

schema.name: Culture & Lifestyle
schema.description: Cultural figures, events, classics, and lifestyle trends. Profiles of influential personalities across business, arts, and society.

seo.title: Tech News | Innovation | Industry Analysis | YOLO LAB
seo.description: Technology industry news, innovation trends, startup disruption, and digital transformation. Analysis of tech's societal impact.

open_graph.title: Technology News & Analysis | YOLO LAB
open_graph.description: Tech industry trends, startup innovation, digital transformation, and how technology reshapes society.

schema.name: Technology News & Innovation
schema.description: Technology industry news, innovation trends, startup disruption, and digital transformation. Analysis of tech's societal impact.

seo.title: Sports News | Athlete Profiles | Industry Analysis | YOLO LAB
seo.description: Sports news, athlete profiles, and industry analysis. Coverage of professional sports, athletics, and sports culture.

open_graph.title: Sports Stories | YOLO LAB
open_graph.description: Sports news, athlete profiles, professional sports coverage, and analysis of sports' cultural impact.

schema.name: Sports News & Analysis
schema.description: Sports news, athlete profiles, and industry analysis. Coverage of professional sports, athletics, and sports culture.

deployment_steps: 6. Verify OG tags render in social preview

notes.og_images: OG images should be cluster-specific graphics (designed separately). Fall back to YOLO LAB logo if unavailable.
notes.schema_validation: Test each schema block at https://validator.schema.org/ before deploying.
notes.robots_meta: All tags set to 'index, follow'. May change to 'noindex, follow' for low-traffic clusters post-launch (defer decision).
future_enhancements: Add breadcrumb schema for tag hierarchy
Add NewsArticle schema for articles within tag pages
Add BreadcrumbList schema for navigation context
